State School Class Class Rank League Record H2H League Rec Power Index APR FQI
Power Index (TOSS model) = 50% APR + 50% FQI. FQI (Flight Quality Index) = per-match flight performance scaled by opponent strength, averaged across dual matches. Hover for FQI+ (100 = classification average). How does this work? →
New from 2026-04-26: the primary Power Index is TOSS — APR is unchanged, and the flight component is FQI (each match's flight performance scaled by the opponent's APR, unclamped, median-normalized). The previous RPI-based formula is retained as Legacy, and QWS (ITA-style quality-weighted wins) continues as the experimental comparison model. Use the Model selector above to switch views. Methodology → · Full AAR →
Regional Mode: Seeds 1-4 protected. Seeds 5-12 optimized for proximity (no same-district matchups).
OSAA Bracketing: Follows official OSAA rules. Attempts up to 3 visitor swaps (downward preferred) to avoid same-league first-round matchups. Never removes home games.
Step 1: Select Auto-Bid Teams (League Champions)

Check the boxes for confirmed league champions. Remaining spots will be filled by Power Index.
